name: Sprint Closure with GitHub Projects
prompt: Sprint 3 is ending tomorrow in my GitHub Project. Walk me through: closing the sprint (handling carryover by moving incomplete items to Backlog), running a retrospective, publishing the GitHub release v0.3.0, and planning Sprint 4 with the top backlog items. Project: mycompany/auth-service Scrum Board.

assertions.text: Shows how to move incomplete issues to Backlog status or next Sprint iteration
Shows updating Status field from In Progress/Blocked to Backlog
Uses gh release create v0.3.0 with correct flags
Shows preparing Sprint 4 by selecting items from Backlog
Steps in logical order: carryover → retro → release → next sprint planning
Consistently uses gh CLI including gh project commands
